basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Scientist and Project Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has published the Project Scientist and Project Engineer Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. IITM/C3DAR/TT/2026/04. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Project Scientist and Project Engineer positions. Candidates holding M.Tech/M.E or equivalent qualifications, B.Tech in Civil Engineering, or a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology (CSE/ECE/EEE/Civil/Instrumentation) with at least 70% marks and 2 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply online through the official IIT Mandi website. The application process is open and will

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/M.E or equivalent, B.Tech in Civil Engineering, Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology (CSE/ECE/EEE/Civil/Instrumentation) with 70% marks and 2 years experience
qualification.details: Project Scientist: M.Tech/M.E or equivalent in Remote Sensing, Hydrology, Water Resources Engineering, Geotechnical Engineering, Earthquake Engineering and allied areas with B.Tech in Civil Engineering or equivalent OR Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or Technology or equivalent from any CFTI with minimum CGPA of 7.5 for General (UR)/7.0 for OBC (NCL)/6.5 for SC/ST/PwD on a 10-point scale. Project Engineer: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology (CSE/ECE/EEE/Civil/Instrumentation or allied areas) with at least 70% marks or equivalent CGPA and minimum 2 years of relevant work experience in handling laboratory equipment, instrumentation, or technical support.

salary_details.details: Project Scientist: INR 42,000 (all-inclusive) per month Project Engineer: INR 45,000 (all-inclusive) per month

selection_process: Online Application via Google Form Shortlisting Interview (offline/online)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Mandi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Project Scientist and Project Engineer posts is 15 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Project Scientist and Project Engineer positions at IIT Mandi. This includes 2 posts for Project Scientist and 1 post for Project Engineer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Scientist?
faq.answer: For the Project Scientist position, candidates need an M.Tech/M.E or equivalent with a B.Tech in Civil Engineering, or a Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering or Technology from a CFTI with a specified CGPA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Project Engineer?
faq.answer: The Project Engineer role requires a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology (CSE/ECE/EEE/Civil/Instrumentation or allied areas) with at least 70% marks and a minimum of 2 years of relevant work experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Scientist position is INR 42,000 per month, and for the Project Engineer position, it is INR 45,000 per month. Both are all-inclusive salaries.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates. Finally, an interview, which can be conducted offline or online, will be held.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online via the Google Form link provided in the "Important Links" section. Ensure all details are accurate and required documents are uploaded.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Project Scientist and Project Engineer at IIT Mandi are contractual in nature.
